TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Kawaliwali, title = Kawaliwali, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kawaliwali} }

S.FORM: alang Kawaliwali ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Ikekami go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 147 buwan, 371 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 74% kyan ku 276 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 26% kyan ku 95 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 71%, Puyuma 1%, Kebalan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'zil na Kawaliwali hya' ga Cipuwa. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Kawaliwali ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Kawaliwali ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Kawaliwali ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Ikekami go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 147 buwan, 371 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 74% kyan ku 276 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 26% kyan ku 95 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 71%, Puyuma 1%, Kebalan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'zil na Kawaliwali hya' ga Cipuwa. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Kawaliwali ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Kawaliwali ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ kawaliwali ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu ikekami ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, pujuma *%, keβalan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔzil na kawaliwali ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨipuwa. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ kawaliwali ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ kawaliwali ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
